name: textream
description: Textream is a free macOS teleprompter app for streamers, interviewers, and presenters. It highlights your script in real-time as you speak, displayed in a beautiful Dynamic Island overlay. With extensible features.
readme_summary: Textream is a free, open-source macOS teleprompter application designed for streamers, interviewers, and presenters. It offers real-time word tracking, classic auto-scroll, and voice-activated scrolling, displayed in a discreet overlay that is invisible to the audience.
key_features: Real-time word tracking using on-device speech recognition
Voice-activated scrolling that pauses when silent
Dynamic Island-style overlay, draggable floating window, or fullscreen on Sidecar iPad
Customizable font, size, and highlight color
Support for multiple languages in speech recognition
Mouse scroll to catch up functionality
primary_use_case: To provide a discreet and customizable teleprompter experience for macOS users during live streams, interviews, or presentations.
cover_image_prompt: A conceptual illustration of a presenter speaking confidently, with a subtle, glowing digital overlay appearing just above their eye level, highlighting words in real-time as they speak. This overlay is shaped like a sleek, modern notification bubble, seamlessly integrated into the presenter's field of vision without obstructing it. The background is a softly blurred studio setting. Small, abstract data particles flow from the presenter's mouth towards the overlay, visually representing the speech-to-text synchronization. The repository name 'Textream' is subtly etched into the overlay's frame. The overall mood is professional and futuristic, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with clean lines and a sophisticated color palette.

name: maxun
description: 🔥 The open-source no-code platform for web scraping, crawling, search and AI data extraction • Turn websites into structured APIs in minutes 🔥
readme_summary: Maxun is an open-source, no-code platform designed to transform websites into structured data APIs. It offers tools for web scraping, crawling, search, and AI-powered data extraction, enabling users to automate data collection without writing code.
primary_use_case: Enabling users to extract structured data from websites and turn them into APIs through a no-code interface.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly robot librarian meticulously organizing books (websites) onto shelves, transforming them into neatly labeled data cards (structured APIs). The robot uses a magnifying glass to read the book spines and a scanner to digitize the information. In the background, a subtle digital stream of data flows from the books to the cards. Small UI elements showing the Maxun logo and a progress bar are visible on the robot's console. The scene is bright and clean, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a vibrant, approachable color palette, emphasizing ease of use and data organization.

name: telegram-mcp
description: Telegram MCP server powered by Telethon to let MCP clients read chats, manage groups, and send/modify messages, media, contacts, and settings.
readme_summary: Telegram MCP Server is a Python-based server that leverages the Telethon library to provide a comprehensive interface for interacting with Telegram. It allows MCP-compatible clients, such as AI assistants, to read chats, manage groups, send and modify messages, media, contacts, and settings.
key_features: Full-featured Telegram integration for MCP-compatible clients (Claude, Cursor, etc.)
Powered by Telethon and the Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Extensive tools for chat and group management (creation, editing, participant management, banning, etc.)
Comprehensive messaging functionalities (sending, editing, deleting, forwarding, pinning messages)
primary_use_case: To act as a bridge between AI models/clients and the Telegram messaging platform, enabling AI to read, understand, and interact with Telegram chats and groups programmatically.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot assistant holding a glowing tablet displaying a Telegram chat interface. The robot is seamlessly connecting wires from the tablet to a large, ornate gateway labeled 'Telegram'. Through the gateway, streams of data representing messages, group icons, and contact photos are flowing into the robot's system. Subtle digital particles and code snippets float around the robot, indicating its AI nature. The background is a clean, modern digital space with soft, inviting lighting. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant colors and clear, friendly character design, emphasizing the seamless integration and broad functionality.

name: clipboard-history
readme_summary: Ringboard is a Rust-based clipboard manager for Linux that efficiently stores, searches, and retrieves clipboard history, including images and arbitrary data. It features a client-server architecture for composability and supports a large history size with minimal resource usage.
key_features: Searchable history with Regex or raw queries
Efficient storage using custom binary format
Fast and scalable with support for ~1 million entries
primary_use_case: Managing and searching clipboard history on Linux systems.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ancient librarian meticulously organizing an infinite library where each book represents a copied item. The librarian uses a glowing quill to write new entries into a grand ledger, while simultaneously pulling specific books from shelves with a magical beam of light. Small, ethereal data streams flow from the librarian's quill to the ledger and from the shelves to a nearby digital display showing searchable text. The library is vast and dimly lit, with subtle glowing runes on the shelves. The repository name 'Ringboard' is subtly etched onto the librarian's desk. The image should be in a detailed digital painting style with a focus on clear iconography and a magical, organized atmosphere.

name: noctalia-shell
description: A sleek and minimal desktop shell thoughtfully crafted for Wayland.
readme_summary: Noctalia Shell is a minimal and customizable desktop shell for Wayland, built on Quickshell (Qt/QML). It offers extensive theming, wallpaper management, a notification system, multi-monitor support, and a lock screen, with nearly 100 available plugins.
key_features: Native support for Niri, Hyprland, Sway, Scroll, Labwc and MangoWC
Extensive theming with predefined color schemes and automatic color generation from your wallpaper
Notification system with history and Do Not Disturb
Desktop widgets (clock, media player and more)
primary_use_case: To provide a beautiful, minimal, and highly customizable desktop shell experience for Wayland users.
cover_image_prompt: A serene, minimalist artist's studio bathed in soft lavender light. In the center, a sleek, modern desktop interface is being sculpted by ethereal, glowing hands. The interface is transforming from a chaotic swirl of raw data and abstract shapes (representing various Wayland compositors and user preferences) into a clean, organized, and aesthetically pleasing desktop environment. Subtle visual cues like floating QML code snippets and small, stylized icons for widgets (clock, music player) are integrated into the scene. The overall mood is one of calm creation and elegant customization, with the Noctalia logo subtly etched into a nearby digital canvas.

name: gdrive
readme_summary: gdrive is a command-line interface (CLI) application built with Rust for interacting with Google Drive. It allows users to manage their files and folders directly from the terminal, acting as a successor to previous gdrive versions.
key_features: Command-line interface for Google Drive interaction
Successor to gdrive2 with basic functionality implemented
primary_use_case: Managing Google Drive files and folders via a command-line interface.
cover_image_prompt: A digital librarian meticulously organizing a vast, glowing library of cloud-stored files. The librarian, represented by a stylized cursor icon, is shown sorting and moving digital file icons (folders, documents, images) between different shelves and sections of the cloud library. Subtle data streams flow between the cursor and the files, indicating command execution. Small, minimalist terminal windows are visible in the background, displaying simple commands and confirmations. The overall scene is clean, modern, and illuminated by a soft, ethereal glow, emphasizing efficient digital organization. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and a cool, tech-oriented color palette.
